boundary: NS203 scans tracked repo text and raw staging policy for PII/secret/source-license blockers. It cannot certify external untracked staging directories or legal sufficiency of third-party materials.
next: NS204 can continue no-active-write guard for AI candidates, imports, dynamic assets, and production history.
